title: World Trade Report 2021: Economic resilience and trade
included_reason: Foundational WTO report on economic resilience and trade, useful for disruptions, resilience framing, and trade-system evidence.

title: OECD Supply Chain Resilience Review: Navigating Risks
included_reason: Core OECD source directly focused on supply-chain resilience, risks, dependencies, and policy responses.

title: Economic Development in Africa Report 2023 - Chapter 1: Global supply chains: Turning disruption into opportunity
included_reason: Useful for disruption, geographic diversification, opportunity framing, and policy responses in global supply chains.

title: Promoting resilience and preparedness in supply chains
included_reason: Strong OECD source for preparedness, resilience measures, and risk-mitigation language.

title: Balancing Efficiency and Resilience in Multimodal Supply Chains
included_reason: Helpful for explicit trade-offs between efficiency and resilience in multimodal supply chains.

title: Collaboration in Supply Chain Management
included_reason: Useful for collaboration, coordination, and management relations across supply-chain actors.

title: Transport System Resilience
included_reason: Relevant bridge source linking transport-system resilience with supply-chain disruption and recovery.

title: Resilience and Reglobalization: Global Value Chain Trends and New Opportunities
included_reason: Current WTO report on GVC trends, resilience, diversification, and restructuring opportunities.

title: Keys to resilient supply chains
included_reason: Compact OECD source with concise resilience concepts and policy vocabulary useful for graph relations.

title: Supply Chain Management Guidance
included_reason: Practical World Bank guidance on supply-chain management, risk handling, and procurement-related mitigation.
